page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 60 dedicated vCPUs derived from 30 physical cores with multithreading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The system is equipped with 480.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of 1608 GB of NVMe SSD capacity across 4 local drives.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance characteristics across multiple domains. The server achieves top 25% scores in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests, alongside a strong PassMark CPU score of 68401.62. Memory performance is highlighted by a strong read-only small block cached bandwidth of 4247.51 GB/sec, though large block uncached read and write bandwidths fall into the average range at 144.14 GB/sec and 54.27 GB/sec respectively. Database operations are highly efficient, with Redis SET operations reaching 78.41 million operations per second and PassMark database operations scoring 26296.65.

This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and data processing tasks. The inclusion of 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage makes it suitable for high-throughput database operations and software compilation, which scored a strong 50355.0 on Geekbench. While LLM inference for small model prompt processing is strong at 3178.69 tokens per second, text generation for larger models remains average, reflecting a tradeoff for non-GPU accelerated hardware.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 60 dedicated vCPUs and 480.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It includes 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance, scoring 86080.44 in stress-ng, and excels in database operations with Redis SET performance reaching 78.41 million operations per second. While memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is high at 4247.51 GB/sec, large block uncached memory operations perform at average levels. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, software compilation, and data processing workloads requiring fast local storage.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60-lssd is an x86_64 server with 60 vCPUs, 480 GB RAM, and 1608 GB local NVMe SSD storage, optimized for memory-intensive databases and high-throughput workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring 60 vCPUs, 480 GB RAM, and high-speed local NVMe storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 60 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor
480.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 4 drives
Strong database performance with 78.41 million Redis SET operations per second
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases, software compilation, and data processing
